chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-52 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to maintainability of petition ------------------------------------- 12.02.2025 Mr. Adam H. Ishaque Sanghaar, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Zardari, A.A.G. SIP Muhammad Imran of PS SSOIU Central Karachi ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition on the ground that the alleged abductee in FIR No.723/2024, registered at P.S. Azizabad, Karachi Central for offence under Section 365-B, PPC has been recovered by the police. SIP Muhammad Imran of SSOIU Central Karachi has filed report, it is taken on record. He submits that the police has recovered the alleged abductee and he will produce her before the learned Magistrate concerned, who may decide the case of alleged abductee in accordance with law. In view of such position, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
